title: Live-Action Demon Slayer Effects
scenario: a cinematic action sequence centered on Live-Action Demon Slayer Effects, with readable geography, staged impacts, speed changes, and strong continuity across shots
description: The source X post explicitly names Seedance 2.x and shares or demonstrates this video prompt format. It is ranked here by verified like count from the original X status.
action: Use this Seedance 2.0 template to recreate the live-action demon slayer effects structure with your own characters, setting, camera path, and safety constraints.
prompt:
【风格】好莱坞真人特效大片(Hollywood Live-Action Blockbuster)，IMAX电影画质，8K超清，真实摄影(Photorealistic)，暗黑奇幻(Dark Fantasy)，虚幻引擎5写实渲染，无动漫感。
【时长】15秒
【场景】月光下真实的迷雾森林，地面是湿润的泥土和真实的落叶。

[00:00-00:05] 镜头1：真人演绎·水之呼吸(Realistic Water FX)。
【特写】一名亚洲少年剑客(真实演员脸部毛孔可见)，身穿绿黑格纹的粗布羽织(布料纹理清晰)。
动作：他在月光下双手握刀，压低重心。
特效：随着他呼吸，刀刃上并未出现卡通水流，而是凝聚出**高度写实的、透明且发光的加压高压水流(Hyper-realistic Fluid Simulation)**。水流像一条活龙一样缠绕着真实的刀身，水滴飞溅在镜头上，折射出月光。

[00:05-00:10] 镜头2：雷霆一闪·极致速度(Lightning Plasma)。
【中景/高速摄影】对面是一名染着金发的青年剑客(真实发丝飘动)，身穿黄色三角纹理的织物外套。
动作：他做出居合斩的起手式，脚下的泥土因为用力过猛而炸裂。
特效：空气中爆发出**真实的刺眼蓝白色电流(Real Plasma Arcs)**，而不是黄色卡通闪电。电流击穿了周围的真实树木，留下烧焦的痕迹。

[00:10-00:15] 镜头3：宿命对决·物理碰撞(Physics Clash)。
【慢动作/大爆炸】两人在画面中心极速对撞。
动作：实体水流巨剑与雷电光刃狠狠撞击在一起。
特效：没有漫画线条，只有**真实的物理粒子爆炸**。大量的水蒸气、泥浆、被震断的树枝和耀眼的电火花在空中四散飞溅。冲击波将两人脚下的积水震起一圈圈真实的涟漪。画面极具重量感和破坏力。

title: Surrealism Megalophobia Epic Visual Spectacle
scenario: a sci-fi or surreal visual sequence around Surrealism Megalophobia Epic Visual Spectacle, with high-scale objects, coherent mechanical motion, layered atmosphere, and a cinematic reveal
description: The source X post explicitly names Seedance 2.x and shares or demonstrates this video prompt format. It is ranked here by verified like count from the original X status.
action: Use this Seedance 2.0 template to recreate the surrealism megalophobia epic visual spectacle structure with your own characters, setting, camera path, and safety constraints.
prompt:
【风格】超现实主义（Surrealism），巨物恐惧症（Megalophobia），史诗级视觉奇观，好莱坞特效质感，光影渲染极其真实。
【时长】15秒
【场景】晴朗的城市上空，或者一片开阔的麦田。

[00:00-00:05] 镜头1：平静的假象（The Calm）。
画面是一片万里无云的绝美蓝天，阳光明媚，鸟儿飞过。镜头慢慢向上仰拍，给人一种岁月静好的感觉。
关键细节：突然，天空中出现了一道巨大的、银色的金属光泽——是一条贯穿天际的**“拉链”**。

[00:05-00:10] 镜头2：拉链拉开（The Unzipping）。
一只**巨大的、半透明的上帝之手**，捏住了拉链头，伴随着巨大的轰鸣声（音效感），缓缓拉开了蓝天。
动作：随着拉链拉开，“蓝天”像布料一样褶皱、垂落。
视觉奇观：拉链后面露出的**不是宇宙**，而是一个**充满了霓虹灯、飞行汽车和巨大机械结构的赛博朋克未来世界**（或者一个巨大的机械眼球正在注视着我们）。

[00:10-00:15] 镜头3：两个世界的对视（The Revelation）。
蓝天只剩下一角挂在天上。原来我们生活的世界只是一个被罩住的“生态箱”。
结尾：镜头快速拉远，发现我们的整个世界（城市/麦田）其实只是巨人桌子上的一个**玻璃微缩景观球**。巨人正凑近脸在观察我们。

title: Eastern Fantasy Wuxia Epic
scenario: a fantasy video built around Eastern Fantasy Wuxia Epic, with atmospheric scale, stylized motion effects, dramatic lighting, and stable character silhouettes
description: The source X post explicitly names Seedance 2.x and shares or demonstrates this video prompt format. It is ranked here by verified like count from the original X status.
action: Use this Seedance 2.0 template to recreate the eastern fantasy wuxia epic structure with your own characters, setting, camera path, and safety constraints.
prompt:
东方玄幻武侠大片(Eastern Fantasy Wuxia Epic)。顶级电影特效，快节奏剪辑，强调力量感的碰撞。视觉风格对比强烈：一方是金色的实体化狂龙，另一方是透明扭曲空气的巨大虚空手掌。

【场景】
荒凉的古战场废墟，尘土飞扬，碎石遍地。

【角色】
1. 粗犷大侠（降龙掌）：满脸胡茬，衣衫褴褛，肌肉虬结，眼神狂野，周身环绕金色蒸汽。
2. 高僧（悲天悯人掌）：身穿黄色袈裟，面容慈悲但神情凝重，周身空气呈现扭曲波纹状。

【分镜脚本】
[00:00-00:03] 镜头1：近身肉搏·拳拳到肉
机位：手持晃动跟拍(Shaky Handheld)。
动作：快节奏剪辑。两人在废墟中极速交手。大侠重拳轰击，金色气劲爆发；和尚以柔克刚，掌风化解攻势。尘土与碎石在两人劲气中炸裂。

[00:03-00:06] 镜头2：拉开距离·蓄势待发
机位：极速后拉镜头(Rapid Pullback)。
动作：一次猛烈的碰撞后，两人同时向后滑行数十米，拉开距离。
特写快切：大侠怒吼，双掌运功，身后空气因高温而扭曲，隐隐传出龙吟声。和尚双手合十再缓缓推出，神情肃穆，面前的空气开始大范围塌陷变形。

[00:06-00:12] 镜头3：绝招对轰·视觉奇观
机位：史诗级广角全景(Epic Wide Shot)。
动作（同时发生）：
大侠：双掌猛然推出，怒吼：“降龙十八掌！”。无数条耀眼的金黄色实体光影巨龙(Countless Golden Energy Dragons)咆哮着从他掌心冲出，汇聚成一股金色洪流。
和尚：平推出一掌。一只巨大无比、半透明的、仿佛由扭曲空气和悲悯光辉构成的无形巨掌(Massive Formless Transparent Palm)凭空出现，缓慢但不可阻挡地压向前方。
特效碰撞：金色龙群狠狠撞击在透明巨掌上，爆发出惊天动地的能量光环，大地龟裂。

[00:12-00:14] 镜头4：破防瞬间
机位：中景冲击镜头。
画面：透明巨掌在无数金龙的撕咬和冲击下出现裂痕，最终轰然破碎消散。剩余的金龙气劲穿透而过，重重轰击在和尚身上。

[00:14-00:15] 镜头5：终局定格
机位：静止定格特写(Freeze Frame)。
画面：和尚向后倒地，嘴角溢出一丝鲜血，表情依然悲悯。大侠保持出掌姿势站立，周身金色气息尚未消散，背景是漫天飘散的能量光点。

prompt:
【风格】伪纪录片（Mockumentary），手机Vlog视角，超写实CG与实景合成，8K画质，毛发物理模拟完美。 【时长】15秒 【场景】重庆洪崖洞或繁华的立交桥路口（具有魔幻8D城市感）。 [00:00-00:05] 镜头1：视觉奇观（The Reveal）。 画面是熙熙攘攘的城市街道。镜头抬起，赫然发现一只**体型如哥斯拉般巨大的橘猫**（Orange Tabby Cat），正卡在两栋摩天大楼中间。 动作：巨猫因为太胖，被卡住了，一脸委屈地挥动着巨大的爪子，试图把自己拔出来。 细节：猫毛在阳光下清晰可见，巨大的肉垫压在玻璃幕墙上，把玻璃挤压得变形。 [00:05-00:10] 镜头2：荒诞互动（The Interaction）。 镜头切换到地面视角。街道上的车流如织，红绿灯闪烁。巨猫低头，巨大的猫脸凑近地面，好奇地嗅着一辆正在等待红灯的公交车。 动作：公交车司机淡定地伸出手，摸了摸巨猫的鼻子。巨猫打了个喷嚏，瞬间吹飞了路边的落叶和行人的帽子（风力特效）。 [00:10-00:15] 镜头3：结尾神梗（The Punchline）。 巨猫终于挤过了大楼，一屁股坐在了跨江大桥上，导致桥面微微下沉（物理反馈）。 字幕/旁白感：它懒洋洋地躺下开始舔毛，挡住了整个晚高峰的去路。镜头最后定格在它无辜的大眼睛上。

title: Neon Tokyo Anime Portrait
scenario: a character-focused image for Cinematic Anime Illustration, preserving identity, expression, pose, costume, and background logic in one coherent frame
description: The source X post explicitly names GPT Image 2 and shares or demonstrates this image prompt format. It is ranked here by verified like count from the original X status.
action: Use this GPT Image 2 template to recreate the cinematic anime illustration structure with your own subject, style, layout, and output constraints.
prompt:
Create an ultra-detailed cinematic anime illustration in the style of a high-budget modern Japanese anime film. A beautiful young woman stands on a rainy neon-lit Tokyo street at night, wearing an oversized black hoodie with subtle glowing blue patterns, loose cargo pants, and stylish sneakers. Her long wet hair flows naturally in the wind, with reflective neon highlights on her face and clothes.
The atmosphere feels emotional, mysterious, and futuristic. Surround the environment with holographic billboards, glowing shop signs, blurred traffic lights, rainy reflections on the street, drifting fog, and soft volumetric lighting. Add dynamic anime-style motion blur, dramatic perspective, realistic rain physics, and highly expressive cinematic eyes.
Color palette: neon blue, purple, pink, cyan, and soft white glow.
Style inspired by Makoto Shinkai + Cyberpunk anime aesthetics + premium anime movie quality.
Camera angle: low-angle cinematic shot with shallow depth of field and strong foreground/background separation.
Ultra-sharp details, anime realism, emotional storytelling composition, 8K quality, masterpiece anime artwork, no text, no watermark.

title: Surreal Sky Battlefield Action
scenario: a cinematic action sequence centered on Surreal Sky Battlefield Action, with readable geography, staged impacts, speed changes, and strong continuity across shots
description: The source X post explicitly names Seedance 2.x and shares or demonstrates this video prompt format. It is ranked here by verified like count from the original X status.
action: Use this Seedance 2.0 template to recreate the surreal sky battlefield action structure with your own characters, setting, camera path, and safety constraints.
prompt: A surreal battlefield in the sky: floating rock islands drifting through a thunderstorm, clouds swirling below like an ocean. The masked ronin dashes across the drifting platforms, pursued by a colossal winged beast whose chest is a swirling vortex of storm clouds and lightning. The camera hurtles from island to island, struggling to keep up as rocks tilt, spin, and crumble away beneath them. Every wingbeat sends shockwaves through the air, shaking the frame and blowing debris and rain straight into the viewer's face. Rapid handheld cuts capture the ronin leaping impossible gaps, sword carving arcs of light that briefly cut through the darkness. The finale shows the camera diving behind him as he jumps off the last crumbling rock, riding a bolt of lightning directly into the monster's chest vortex with a final, all-or-nothing slash that explodes the storm from within and clears the sky in a blinding flash.

title: Ink Wash New Year Beasts
scenario: a Seedance 2.0 video concept based on Oriental Ink Wash Aesthetics Storyboard New Year Double Auspicious, with a clear visual hook, controlled camera movement, stable subject identity, and a strong ending frame
description: The source X post explicitly names Seedance 2.x and shares or demonstrates this video prompt format. It is ranked here by verified like count from the original X status.
action: Use this Seedance 2.0 template to recreate the oriental ink wash aesthetics storyboard new year double auspicious structure with your own characters, setting, camera path, and safety constraints.
prompt:
东方水墨美学分镜（新春双瑞・国风祥和）3D 动态水墨动画，融合国画泼彩与留白美学。以焦墨与朱砂红为核心视觉对比。画面诗意流畅、生机温润。运用水墨晕染、飞白笔触与渐变流动效果，全程祥和美好，展现时光悠然、万象更新的东方意境。 【场景】一幅徐徐展开的纯白宣纸，或天地间飘渺云海。背景是淡墨远山、青松与缭绕云雾，留白空灵、宁静深远。 【意象】 朱砂瑞马：朱砂红墨挥洒而成，马鬃如流动墨线，奔腾带飞白笔触，气韵生动，象征生机盎然、刚健向上。 绯红瑞羊：淡红水墨晕染凝聚，身形朦胧柔美，羊角如如意云纹，步伐轻盈，象征包容温润、宁静祥和。 【分镜脚本】[00:00-00:03] 镜头 1：落笔生花・瑞马启程机位：微距俯拍渐变推长镜头。动作：一滴朱砂红墨落在宣纸上，晕染如涟漪，顺势化作朱砂瑞马。骏马昂首从容，踏水墨云烟从画卷入 3D 空间，写意飘逸。 [00:03-00:06] 镜头 2：云间相伴・瑞羊现身机位：平滑横移跟拍。动作：瑞马在云端漫步，红色墨痕与云雾相融，淡红水墨凝聚成绯红瑞羊，踏云而行，脚下生水墨兰草与祥云。 [00:06-00:12] 镜头 3：双瑞和美・生机绽放机位：大远景，展现水墨画卷全貌。动作：瑞马与瑞羊相伴同行，红墨韵致流转浸润。枯笔草木抽枝发芽，绽放朱砂桃花，呈现万物生长、春意盎然之美。 [00:12-00:14] 镜头 4：万象更新・清雅意境机位：中景仰拍，焦点随花瓣飞舞。动作：墨韵化作轻柔花雨落下，双瑞融于天地红霞间。远山如洗，江水如镜，画面过渡为清新明快的青绿山水意境。 [00:14-00:15] 镜头 5：留白定格・吉祥收尾机位：静止定格，模拟画卷收尾。动作：动态水墨定格为一幅山水国画。画卷右上角留白处浮现红色方形印章，篆书 “万象更新”。一声空灵古琴音，画面渐淡出于纯白，余韵悠长。

title: Liquid Metal Android Transformation
scenario: a sci-fi or surreal visual sequence around Transform Prompt Framework, with high-scale objects, coherent mechanical motion, layered atmosphere, and a cinematic reveal
description: The source X post explicitly names Seedance 2.x and shares or demonstrates this video prompt format. It is ranked here by verified like count from the original X status.
action: Use this Seedance 2.0 template to recreate the transform prompt framework structure with your own characters, setting, camera path, and safety constraints.
prompt: 参考画像の人物をキャラクタープロトタイプとして使用する。 SHOT 1 — 銀色液体金属（0–3秒） 固定俯瞰、完全静止。 円形金属プラットフォーム中央で、鏡面の銀色液体金属が冷白色ライトを反射しながら流動。微振動後、磁場に引かれるように中央へ収束し、女性シルエットへ立体形成。 液体はチタン合金構造へ分離。 脊柱が下から順にロック、肋骨展開、骨盤閉合。 四肢関節が回転固定、内部油圧が作動。 液体が内側へ凝固し、ブラッシュド加工の機械骨格が露出。 クールブルーのリムライト。指先が微動。 冷色・高コントラストの実験室空間。 SHOT 2 — 皮膚形成（3–7秒） 正面ミディアム固定。 ロボットアームが透明モールドを下降。 高分子バイオ皮膚が薄膜のように密着。ナノファイバー融合、筋肉が微収縮テスト。 マクロ：毛穴生成、肌テクスチャ形成。 首は一部透明構造を維持、内部に緑色発光ライン。 肌色が自然な人肌へ変化。 SHOT 3 — 顔・猫耳（7–9秒） クローズアップ、ゆっくり前進。 閉眼。虹彩は淡いブルーグレー。 バイオ猫耳展開。黒白ツートンの長髪生成、自然落下。 顔に微細な機械紋様を残す。 ゆっくり開眼。冷静でやや憂いのある視線。 SHOT 4 — メイク（9–10秒） マクロ。 頬をブラシで整え、唇色調整。 黒白対称ヘアを仕上げ。 自然な皮膚反射とSSS表現。 SHOT 5 — 着装（10–12秒） 全身ミディアム。 グリーンの未来制服が自動装着。 肩と袖口が発光。 首の透明機構が柔らかな緑光。布地質感明瞭。 SHOT 6 — 登場・台詞（12–15秒） ワイド映画画角。 実験室の扉が開く。逆光リムライト。 一歩前進、軽く首を傾け、カメラに正確にフォーカス。 自然な微笑。 やさしく落ち着いた声で： 「Hi, my master.」 自然なリップシンク。 0.5秒アイコンタクト維持。 4K HDR、シネマティックライティング。

prompt:
动漫风格，国风2d风格，类似玄机科技的画风白发少女，扎发，冷白皮肤，兼具冷艳系长相，画面有颗粒感。

丹凤眼，闭眼姿态，表情慵懒平静，举止端庄，极致细节，极致厚涂，琉璃质感，流线笔刷。白色披着的头发，身着藏蓝色绒翎长袍，衣服的元素带有少数民族元素，整体有柔光、质感，氛围梦幻朦胧，低饱和度，富有反差故事感。头上簪着一支蓝色翡翠或者水晶垂吊簪，既显温婉又不失贵气，契合角色气质形象。

正脸示人，轻笑一声，语气轻柔又不屑说完＂哦？要抓我？＂

之后，缓缓抬眼，眼中闪炸开一丝微乎其微的光，瞬间镜头从她脸前拉远，身后瞬间乌云密布电闪雷鸣，一条水龙从天而降咆哮龙吟一声，极速飞至她头顶，霸气盘立上空，眼中红光乍现，震耳的嗡鸣声滚滚响起。

title: Awakening Future Cyberpunk Warrior
scenario: a cinematic action sequence centered on Awakening Future Cyberpunk Warrior, with readable geography, staged impacts, speed changes, and strong continuity across shots
description: The source X post explicitly names Seedance 2.x and shares or demonstrates this video prompt format. It is ranked here by verified like count from the original X status.
action: Use this Seedance 2.0 template to recreate the awakening future cyberpunk warrior structure with your own characters, setting, camera path, and safety constraints.
prompt:
【影片设定】电影级质感，IMAX画幅，ARRI Alexa 65mm，高对比度，赛博朋克美学，8K分辨率。

【核心概念】时空折叠。从古老纯净的盐湖神女，瞬间觉醒为未来都市的霓虹战士。

镜头1：全景，缓慢推镜头。 画面极静。少女身穿红白民族盛装，戴银饰，伫立在如镜面的白色盐湖。阳光圣洁，背景雪山连绵，风吹衣角，神性满满。

镜头2：超特写（ECU），匹配剪辑。 镜头急速推进至少女眼睛。瞳孔瞬间放大，瞳孔中映射出倒退的数字流和蓝色数据光效。

镜头3：跳切，故障艺术干扰。 画面瞬间被强烈的霓虹光撕裂。白色的盐湖背景瞬间变成雨夜中闪烁的赛博城市全息广告牌。

镜头4：中景，低角度仰拍。 视觉重击。她依然站在画面中央，但民族长袍已变成高科技反光机能服。原本的银质头饰变成了金属流光耳机。

镜头5：特写，光影流转。 雨水落在她脸上，反射着粉紫色的霓虹灯光。她对着镜头冷冷一笑，伸手戴上护目镜，气场全开。

镜头6：大远景，定格。 她站在摩天大楼顶端俯瞰整个钢铁森林，身后是巨大的全息投影鲸鱼游过。字幕：“觉醒·未来”。

时长：10秒 | 风格：好莱坞顶级商业片 | 视觉冲击：极强

title: Eastern Fantasy Game Character Cg
scenario: a GPT Image 2 template for Eastern Fantasy Game Character CG, with a reusable visual structure, faithful reference handling, readable details, and production-ready finish
description: The source X post explicitly names GPT Image 2 and shares or demonstrates this image prompt format. It is ranked here by verified like count from the original X status.
action: Use this GPT Image 2 template to recreate the eastern fantasy game character cg structure with your own subject, style, layout, and output constraints.
prompt:
请创作一幅【人物角色】使用【乐器或武器】的东方幻想人物概念插画。

整体风格融合国风仙侠、神话圣像感与电影级CG概念原画质感，画面具有强烈的东方幻想美学、高级审美与史诗感。人物为主视觉核心，气质空灵、神圣、优雅、清冷或威严，根据【人物角色】自动匹配最合适的神态、服饰、发型、配饰与身份设定。

如果【乐器或武器】是乐器，则人物呈现演奏、拨弦、吹奏、执乐而立等充满仪式感与流动感的姿态，强调音乐能量、灵气流动、音波化作光纹、云气、星辉或法阵。
如果【乐器或武器】是武器，则人物呈现持械、蓄势、对峙、施法或战斗前一瞬的姿态，强调力量感、压迫感、气场与能量汇聚。

构图以人物居中或偏中心为主，整体平衡、庄严、具有海报级主视觉效果；人物背后可带有月轮、法环、神性光晕、古老纹阵或圣像式圆形结构。服装采用东方幻想风格，材质轻盈华美，带轻纱、飘带、层叠衣摆、金属饰件、玉饰或冠饰，发丝与布料在风中流动，形成强烈的动态美感。

背景根据角色气质自动匹配为星空神域、云海天界、月下圣境、竹林仙山、冰雪秘境、幽夜神坛、古风遗迹等东方幻想场景，环境带有薄雾、流光、粒子、神秘能量与空间纵深。色彩以统一且高级的主色调控制画面，可根据角色和道具自动选择冰蓝、月白、青绿、幽紫、赤金、墨黑、银灰等配色，并用少量淡金或冷光进行神性点缀。

整体要求：唯美、梦幻、空灵、神秘、超脱、神圣、精致，具有电影级光影、体积光、空气感、超细节CG插画质感，避免俗艳、避免廉价古风写真感、避免网红脸、避免杂乱背景、避免塑料质感。

title: Eastern Fantasy Wuxia Epic
scenario: a fantasy video built around Eastern Fantasy Wuxia Epic, with atmospheric scale, stylized motion effects, dramatic lighting, and stable character silhouettes
description: The source X post explicitly names Seedance 2.x and shares or demonstrates this video prompt format. It is ranked here by verified like count from the original X status.
action: Use this Seedance 2.0 template to recreate the eastern fantasy wuxia epic structure with your own characters, setting, camera path, and safety constraints.
prompt:
【风格】东方玄幻武侠（Wuxia Fantasy），电影级特效大片，史诗感，慢动作与快剪结合，粒子光效炸裂，4K超清。
【时长】15秒
【角色】剑圣（白衣飘飘，仙风道骨）VS 刀魔（黑甲重铠，霸气外露）。
【场景】云海之巅的破碎古剑台，残阳如血。

[00:00-00:05] 镜头1：剑意·万剑归宗（The Sword Storm）。
剑圣悬浮半空，双手掐诀。他身后的一柄古剑瞬间分化出成千上万把散发着幽蓝光芒的能量光剑。
【特效】无数光剑在空中汇聚成一条巨大的发光巨龙（Vortex of Light Swords），遮天蔽日，带着刺耳的破空声向刀魔倾泻而下。

[00:05-00:10] 镜头2：刀意·一刀斩（The Domineering Slash）。
面对漫天剑雨，刀魔纹丝不动，双手握住一把厚重的赤红巨刀高举过头顶。
【特效】地面在他脚下龟裂破碎，岩浆涌出。巨刀瞬间凝聚出恐怖的赤红火焰刀芒，周围空间都因高温而扭曲。他怒吼一声，极其简单粗暴地挥出这毁天灭地的一刀。

[00:10-00:15] 镜头3：极致碰撞（The Final Clash）。
一道横贯天地的半月形赤红刀气撞上迎面而来的蓝色剑雨长河。
【特效】红蓝两种能量瞬间对撞爆炸，产生巨大的环形冲击波，将周围的云海和山峰瞬间震碎。画面在能量爆发的极亮白光中结束。

#seedance2

title: Bioluminescent Polar Abyss
scenario: a verified Kling X prompt focused on A vast polar abyss unfolds beneath an endless, preserving the original source language, camera intent, motion cues, and visible generation instructions
description: The source X post explicitly mentions Kling and includes visible prompt text in the original post body. Metrics are captured from the X tweet snapshot.
action: Use the original Kling prompt for A vast polar abyss unfolds beneath an endless as a video-generation structure with your own subject, setting, camera path, and duration constraints.
prompt:
A vast polar abyss unfolds beneath an endless ceiling of dark water, glowing faintly with drifting bioluminescent currents. The viewpoint descends vertically through layers of deep cobalt and teal, passing slow-moving clouds of luminescent plankton that pulse like living constellations. Translucent jellyfish drift upward in elegant formations, their tendrils leaving soft trails of light, while massive manta rays glide silently through the depths, their silhouettes briefly eclipsing the glow below.

As the descent continues, a colossal alien caldera emerges from the darkness, its circular walls fractured and eroded by time. Embedded into the volcanic rock is an ancient ring-sanctuary of impossible scale, half-buried in sediment and overgrown with radiant coral, glowing algae, and crystalline growths that emit rhythmic pulses of light. Geothermal vents exhale slow plumes of shimmering particles, bending the water around them like liquid glass.

The movement transitions into a gradual orbital motion around the structure, revealing immense carved glyphs and monolithic arches wrapped in coral reefs. Schools of bioluminescent fish spiral through the ruins, forming luminous currents that trace the geometry of the architecture. Fine bubbles and mineral particles drift continuously, refracting light into soft caustic patterns across stone and coral.

At the heart of the sanctuary, a dormant circular portal begins to awaken. Ancient mechanisms hum to life as concentric rings rotate and align, releasing spiraling bands of radiant energy. The surrounding water vibrates subtly, sending ripples through suspended particles and causing nearby marine life to scatter and regroup. Coral polyps bloom in real time, flaring brighter as the portal intensifies.

The motion shifts into a slow, deliberate push forward toward the portal’s core. Energy rings expand outward, bending light and water into luminous distortions. Bubbles are drawn inward, spiraling around the gateway as the glow reaches a blinding crescendo. Massive creatures circle at a distance, silhouetted against the expanding light, while the entire caldera pulses as if responding to the portal’s return.

The sequence ends with the portal fully activated, its radiant core stabilizing into a swirling vortex of teal and electric blue energy, illuminating the ancient sanctuary and the surrounding abyss.

Cinematic underwater fantasy realism, high-fidelity VFX, volumetric light rays, soft caustics, particle-rich environment, bioluminescent color palette, epic scale, slow majestic motion, inspired by Avatar: The Way of Water and Aquaman.

Negative Prompts: Artifacts, Deformed, Low Quality, Multiple Appendages, Grainy, Blurry, Distorted, Pixelated, Anime-like, Cartoonish, Static, Flat, Out of Focus, Unclear, Oversaturated, Fuzzy, Foggy, Warped, Still, Morphing, Error-Prone, Slow, Low Resolution, Unrefined, Undefined, Frozen

This Video was created using @wavespeed_ai

title: Sci-Fi Lunar Time Traveler
scenario: a verified Kling X prompt focused on I used to achieve this video right on, preserving the original source language, camera intent, motion cues, and visible generation instructions

prompt:
I used to achieve this video right on Warden using Kling 2.5 pro for less than $0.15 (You can use it to generate yours)

𝙏𝙝𝙚 𝙥𝙧𝙤𝙢𝙥𝙩

“Cinematic 4K video, hyper-realistic sci-fi style, year 2079. A young Black man in his 20s, the time traveler, wearing a sleek white-and-black futuristic SpaceX spacesuit with glowing blue accents and helmet visor up, steps out of a landed SpaceX Starship on the lunar surface. The massive spaceship door hisses open with steam venting into the vacuum as he emerges.

Dynamic tracking camera follows him: he immediately begins floating and bounding gently in low lunar gravity — slow, graceful leaps and drifts, arms outstretched in wonder, eyes wide with awe as he looks around like a time traveler discovering the future.

Wide aerial shots reveal a thriving human moon settlement: sleek high-rising domed buildings and glass-and-metal towers connected by pressurized walkways, solar arrays gleaming, greenhouses glowing, small rovers and people in spacesuits moving between habitats. Earth hangs large and blue in the black star-filled sky.

He floats toward his modern lunar home — a stylish low-profile pressurized dome house with large viewing windows. Golden sunlight from the lunar day casts long dramatic shadows, soft Earthshine glow, highly detailed textures on suits, architecture, and regolith dust kicking up slowly in low gravity, smooth realistic physics, epic and heartwarming atmosphere, 15-second clip.”

Dynamic tracking camera follows him: he immediately begins floating and bounding gently in low lunar gravity — slow, graceful leaps and drifts, arms outstretched in wonder, eyes wide with awe as he looks around like a time traveler discovering the future.

Wide aerial shots reveal a thriving human moon settlement: sleek high-rising domed buildings and glass-and-metal towers connected by pressurized walkways, solar arrays gleaming, greenhouses glowing, small rovers and people in spacesuits moving between habitats. title: Rainy Cyberpunk Cyborg Alley
scenario: a verified Happy Horse X prompt focused on Scene: A rain-soaked cyberpunk alley at night, neon, preserving the original source language, camera intent, motion cues, and visible generation instructions
description: The source X post explicitly mentions Happy Horse and includes visible prompt text in the original post body. Metrics are captured from the X tweet snapshot.
action: Use the original Happy Horse prompt for Scene: A rain-soaked cyberpunk alley at night, neon as a video-generation structure with your own subject, setting, camera path, and duration constraints.
prompt:
Scene:
A rain-soaked cyberpunk alley at night, neon signs reflecting across black puddles, steam rising from street vents, blue and magenta light cutting through thin fog.

Subject:
A tall cybernetic human with chrome-plated arms, exposed mechanical joints, one glowing red optical implant, a black tactical coat, and illuminated circuit lines running beneath translucent skin panels.

Action:
The cyborg stands motionless under a flickering neon sign, turns its head slowly toward the camera, clenches one mechanical hand, then steps forward through shallow puddles as reflections ripple outward with each footstep.

Camera:
Medium low-angle shot, camera slowly dollies backward in front of the cyborg while maintaining eye-level focus on the glowing optical implant.

Physics:
Rain falls consistently onto metal surfaces, droplets bead and slide across chrome plating, steam curls upward from vents, puddles ripple naturally under the cyborg’s weight.

Audio:
Heavy rain, distant traffic hum, buzzing neon, hydraulic servo sounds with each movement, low electronic bass pulse.

Style:
Gritty cinematic cyberpunk realism, high-contrast neon lighting, detailed mechanical surfaces, grounded physical motion, Blade Runner-inspired atmosphere.
